status_select_mode: Select an operation mode to begin.
status_ready_decompile: Ready to Decompile. Press Start to begin.
status_ready_compile: Ready to Compile. Press Start to begin.
status_step2_decompile: Step 2 enabled >> Select save location folder
status_step2_compile: Step 2 enabled >> Select save location file
status_info_complete: Info retrieval complete. Rendering log to window...
lbl_image_display: Run 'Get Info' on a file to preview textures.
tooltip_select_output_folder: Select folder to extract texture images to
tooltip_get_info: Get information from the selected .xbt file
tooltip_select_output_file: Select folder to compile texture file
tooltip_open_last_decompile: Open the last used decompile input file
tooltip_open_last_compile: Open the last used compile input folder
tooltip_dupecheck: Prevents duplicate textures from being added during compilation.
tooltip_dev_mode: Enable developer mode features. Requires hotkey (Shift+Alt+D) to enable.
tooltip_help_support: Open the Kodi forum thread for help and support.
tooltip_reload_all: Reload the last used paths for all modes
tooltip_about: Show application version, build date, and author information.
tooltip_copy_all: Copy the entire log to the clipboard
tooltip_open_log_file: Open the current session log file in the default editor.
tooltip_image_display:
Double-click to open image in default viewer.
Right-click for more options.
tooltip_export_pdf: Export the retrieved image info to a PDF gallery
tooltip_search_criteria: Select the criteria to search by.
tooltip_search_input: Enter search term and press Enter or use Find buttons.
tooltip_disabled_runtimes_decompile: Disabled. Required C++ Runtimes are missing. See Display menu.
tooltip_disabled_runtimes_compile: Disabled. Required C++ Runtimes are missing. See Display menu.
tooltip_open_compile_file: Select the output file location for compilation (e.g., MySkin.xbt)
tooltip_open_compile_folder: Select the input folder containing images to compile
tooltip_open_decompile_file: Select the input .xbt file to decompile
tooltip_open_decompile_folder: Select the output folder where extracted images will be saved
tooltip_clear_compile_files: Clear the list of recent compile output files
tooltip_clear_compile_folders: Clear the list of recent compile input folders
tooltip_clear_decompile_files: Clear the list of recent decompile input files
tooltip_clear_decompile_folders: Clear the list of recent decompile output folders
tooltip_reload_all_action: Reload the most recently used paths for all modes
tooltip_close_all_action: Clear all active input and output selections
tooltip_open_decompile_on_complete: Automatically open the output folder after a successful decompile
tooltip_open_compile_on_complete: Automatically open the output folder after a successful compile
tooltip_open_pdf_on_complete: Automatically open the generated PDF report after a successful export
tooltip_swap_log_position: Toggle the position of the log viewer (top or bottom)
tooltip_show_compile_on_top: Display the Compile Mode group at the top of the panel.
tooltip_reset_geometry: Reset the main window size and position to the default
tooltip_clear_log_action: Clear all messages from the log viewer
tooltip_check_updates_on_startup: Enable or disable automatic update checks when the application starts
tooltip_changelog: View the application's version history and changes
tooltip_kodi_forum: Open the official Kodi support forum thread
tooltip_update_disabled: Disabled. Requires the VC++ Runtimes to be installed.
tooltip_dev_update: Manually provide a URL to a version.json file for update testing.
tooltip_update_check: Manually check for new application updates
tooltip_install_runtimes: Install the required Visual C++ 2010 Runtimes (requires administrator).
tooltip_reinstall_runtimes: Force a reinstallation of the runtimes (for repair).
tooltip_reinstall_runtimes_disabled: Runtimes must be installed first before they can be reinstalled.
dialog_about_description: The ultimate tool for compiling and decompiling Kodi texture files (.xbt).
dialog_help_content:
Support (Moral & Otherwise) for Kodi TextureTool is provided through the Kodi community forums.

Opening a log file from the application directory. Please copy/paste and include this log when submitting an issue.

Click OK to open the official Kodi forum thread and the log file.
